title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Deleting devices
scenario: Verify that deleting a device from the device list works correctly when multiple devices are paired and connected, and that remaining devices are still displayed with proper connected/disconnected states.
steps: Pair and connect at least 3 devices.
Delete one device from the device list.
Verify the deleted device is properly removed from the list.
Verify remaining devices are still present and properly displayed with connected/disconnected state.
Turn off and delete the remaining devices.
Verify all devices can be properly removed from the list.
expected: The device is properly removed from the list. Remaining devices are still present and properly displayed with connected/disconnected state. All devices can be properly removed from the list.
